data.content: I can see you have an MSTest project with a failing test — `CalculateShipping_ExpressDelivery_Returns15` expects `15.00` but the method returns `10.00`. Let me start `dotnet watch test` for you:

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test with hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test with hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to use hot reload to iterate on failing tests. I can see the test project uses MSTest with .NET 8.0. I'll start `dotnet watch test` which will re-run tests automatically when files change.

Let me first run the tests to see the current state, then start `dotnet watch test`.
